name: Feature request
about: Suggest a creator-facing improvement
title: "[Feature]: "

---

## Creator Problem

What creator workflow problem does this solve?

## Proposed Outcome

Describe the user-visible behavior, not only a technical implementation.

## Alternatives Considered

What other workflows or approaches could solve the problem?

## Architecture Impact

Does this fit existing modules and contracts? If not, explain why an architecture discussion is needed.

## Additional Context

Add examples, references, or mockups.
